title: artemisia campestris var. stenoclada
intro: Artemisia campestris var. stenoclada, also known as wormwood, is a perennial plant belonging to the sunflower family, native to Europe and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include being a natural antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory agent. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, wormwood is commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although it is essential to use it in moderation and under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
